name: 3forge-mcp
description: 3forge skills and agents for AMI authoring and optional live runtime workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and build on a live 3forge instance.
interface.longDescription: Provide Codex with reusable skills for 3forge AMI authoring, operations guidance, and optional live-runtime workflows. Runtime MCP connections are configured outside this plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use 3forge MCP to inspect my AMI instance.
Use 3forge MCP to plan a layout change.
Use 3forge MCP to review a 3forge workflow.
